meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.11 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] ［＃挿絵（file、横W×縦H）入る］ is the bundled illustration form carrying a pixel-size note. The 横W×縦H dimensions are split off `file` (so stays a clean path) and surface as width/height attributes; they round-trip verbatim. The corpus' standard figure form (~1.3k). Offsets from the §3 byte model; expected captured from the aozora #114/#118 reference implementation (the project's canonical processor).
